reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The only gas station we stopped at when traveling to Argentina, excellent!

(Original)
Único posto que paramos quando viajamos para Argentina, excelente!

reviews.comment:
Clave si vas hacer la ruta 40 es la única estación de servicios. No tiene cafeteria

(Translated by Google)
If you're traveling on Route 40, this is the only service station. It doesn't have a cafeteria.

una estación chica, sin mini mercado.
para cargar combustible y seguir de viaje

For refueling and continuing the journey

reviews.comment:
Me robaron haciendo cola para comprar.
Tengan cuidado en cachi, los lugareños no son tan buenos como uno imaginaria

(Translated by Google)
I was robbed while waiting in line to buy something.
Be careful in Cachi; the locals aren't as nice as you might think.
